summary_en: 4,048,500 shares acquired (4.56% of shares outstanding) for ¥3.00B via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-21. Program authorized by board on 2026-05-20 is now complete. Rationale: flexible capital allocation in response to changing business environment.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Results and Completion of Own Share Acquisition via Off-Exchange Purchase Transaction (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: On 2026-05-21, Daiho Corporation completed acquisition of 4,048,500 shares (4.56% of shares outstanding excluding treasury) for a total of ¥2,999,938,500 using the ToSTNeT-3 off-exchange purchase method on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The acquisition was authorized by board resolution on 2026-05-20 and is now fully concluded. The company stated the purpose of the buyback as executing flexible capital policy in response to changes in the operating environment.
